nasb.text: They turned aside there and came to the house of the young man, the Levite, to the house of Micah, and asked him of his welfare.

esv.text: And they turned aside there and came to the house of the young Levite, at the home of Micah, and asked him about his welfare.

cnv.text: 於是他們五人轉身，進入米迦的家，來到那青年利未人的屋裡，向他問安。

ccb.text: 那五个人就进入米迦的家里，到年轻的利未人房间向他问安，
